subject: Fix field unlocking bug when switching calculation modes
body:
- Fixed bug where previously calculated fields remained locked when switching between calculation modes
- Added previousCalculationModes tracking to properly unlock fields
- Only one field is now locked at a time (the current calculation target)
- Removed tier selector UI (no longer relevant with calculation modes)
- Updated documentation to reflect field state management behavior

The calculator now correctly unlocks the previous field when:
- Switching from "Calculate Price" to "Calculate Margin"
- Switching from any calculation mode to another
- Switching to "Manual Entry" mode (unlocks all fields)
title: Fix field unlocking bug when switching calculation modes
